items.name_en: Authentic Grade
items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
 [Top-tier Replica] M14967👏👏“City Spring” series entry “Portofeu Victorienne”. Classic item finished in two colors, colored with a single pattern from a manor update. Features multiple compartments for bills, coins, and cards. Compact size fashionable leather accessory suitable for daily use. Gold metal hardware adds a timeless impression. Size: 12 x 9.5 x 2.5cm. 🎁🎁

items.name_en: 💰 CHANEL Classic Flap Card Holder [Color] This card holder features a unique accordion design [Heart], allowing you to easily see every card without having to dig it out. The card holder has a total of six card slots, four of which can hold many cards 😘😘😘 It looks so good. Model A, Size 10.4×7×2cm, Color as shown
